channel.title: Comments on: Coeur d’Alene Brewing Company, Ep. 50
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: chilowt
item.dc:creator: chilowt
item.description: You guys are hilarious. I'm loving this website, where has it been all my life?
item.content:encoded: You guys are hilarious. I’m loving this website, where has it been all my life?

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Huckleberry was a good beer, it had a nice subtle fruit flavor that worked really well in a beer!
item.content:encoded: Huckleberry was a good beer, it had a nice subtle fruit flavor that worked really well in a beer!

item.title: By: Kendra and Bud Eggleton
item.dc:creator: Kendra and Bud Eggleton
item.description: Great Video! Were are now planning a trip to Idaho-just to taste that Huckleberry beer, sounds pretty darn good.
item.content:encoded: Great Video! Were are now planning a trip to Idaho-just to taste that Huckleberry beer, sounds pretty darn good.
